hypotheses.description: The parser call `raw_vector = json.loads(profile["syntax_vector"])` at src/stylometry_core/syntax_fingerprint_core.py:141 has no nearby exception handling, so malformed input may escape as an opaque failure.
hypotheses.falsification_test: Feed malformed input to the function containing line 141; a named boundary error or explicit rejection falsifies the hypothesis.

limitations: Hypotheses require module 3 verification; parser candidates may receive isolated induction, while unsupported families remain AST-only.
